properties.name: pkauth.relying-party.id
properties.description: WebAuthn relying-party id (usually the registrable domain, e.g. example.com).

properties.name: pkauth.relying-party.name
properties.description: Human-readable relying-party name surfaced by the authenticator.

properties.name: pkauth.relying-party.origins
properties.description: Allow-listed origins for strict origin validation.

properties.name: pkauth.jwt.secret
properties.description: HS256 shared secret. Leave unset only for dev — a random per-startup secret will be generated.

properties.name: pkauth.jwt.token-ttl
properties.description: How long an issued JWT is valid for.

properties.name: pkauth.ceremony.challenge-ttl
properties.description: How long a generated WebAuthn challenge remains valid.
